title: [Arc] Handle sv.xmr.ref ops and hw.hierpath ops

features.name: sv.xmr.ref operation
features.description: Code should include an sv.xmr.ref operation that creates a cross-module reference to a hierarchical path.

features.name: hw.hierpath operation
features.description: Code should include an hw.hierpath operation defining a named hierarchical path through module instances.

features.name: hw.module.extern operation
features.description: Code should include an hw.module.extern operation representing an external module with symbols referenced by hierarchical paths.

features.name: sv.xmr.ref with hierpath reference
features.description: Code should include an sv.xmr.ref operation that references a hierarchical path symbol pointing into an external module instance.

features.name: hierarchy flattening with hierpath preservation
features.description: Code should include a design where module instances are flattened while hw.hierpath or sv.xmr.ref ops retaining symbol references to external modules remain in the IR.
